title: Yorkshire Pudding
instructions: Pour drippings into 9 x 13 inch pan and tilt to coat surface well including sides.
Place all ingredients in blender and mix until smooth.
Bake 23 to 25 minutes or until deep golden brown and puffed.
notes: Remove Prime Rib from oven when internal temperature reaches about 128 to 130 degrees, then increase oven temperature to 425 degrees.
Cover or tent the Prime Rib with aluminum foil and it will continue to cook while the Yorkshire pudding bakes.
Have everything else ready when Yorkshire Pudding is done as it needs to be served immediately.
